_meta.status: DRAFT — replace with the real exported Paperclip company template once Paperclip is installed (HANDOFF-agentic-harness.md §4.1, §2.4). Kept in git either way, so org-chart changes stay diffable, reviewable commits (CLAUDE.md hard rule #7).
_meta.shape_note: Field names follow the handoff's vocabulary (claude_local adapter, budgetMonthlyCents, heartbeat); reconcile with Paperclip's actual export schema at install time.
_meta.roles_note: Project Lead plus the six delivery roles (research/design/engineer/qa/release/support). Budgets and heartbeat intervals are per-project tuning knobs at instantiation — budgetMonthlyCents must never be left unset (Task 2). Amounts below are placeholders.
_meta.trust_note: Every agent starts at trust tier 0: no dangerouslySkipPermissions, all actions gated, everything routes to review. Tier raises are Board-granted manual edits under config/trust_tiers/ (CLAUDE.md hard rule #2).
_meta.secrets_note: Each adapter references its Anthropic key via Paperclip secret syntax, e.g. ${secrets.anthropic_key} — never hardcoded here (HANDOFF §4.3).
